text.content: 2.1  Scale Preview Exploration  [s2_1_scale_preview_exploration]

text.content: Vertical bar graph appears with Scale Preview System. Four clickable scale buttons visible: Scale of 1, Scale of 2, Scale of 5, Scale of 10. Graph displays student's data using currently selected scale.

text.content: 4.1  Bridge Lesson  [s4_1_bridge_lesson]

rich_text.plain_text: 4.1  Bridge Lesson  [s4_1_bridge_lesson]

text.content: "You just saw that all four scales worked for your data. Nice to have options!"

rich_text.plain_text: "You just saw that all four scales worked for your data. Nice to have options!"

text.content: "But what if the numbers are bigger? Or what if you need to figure out which scale is best?"

rich_text.plain_text: "But what if the numbers are bigger? Or what if you need to figure out which scale is best?"

text.content: "Let's learn how to figure out which scale to choose, and what tells us that a scale won't work for the data we have."

rich_text.plain_text: "Let's learn how to figure out which scale to choose, and what tells us that a scale won't work for the data we have."
